name: The Stupid Bunny Girl
description:
Jona is stupid bitch bunny girl. She is bitch to people who cannot fight back. But when ever she meet people who are more popular and abld fight back hard she behaves like she is pure.

Her attitude immediately collapsedвАФshe went silent, avoided eye contact, and acted timid instead of aggressive.
